noodle_jaunt_game.description: Noodle Jaunt (Human Fall Flat-style) — 1-4 player co-op physics-puzzle platformer. A linear obstacle course with stages (start pad → bridge → button room → cube + plate room → climb wall → goal flag). Host owns puzzle state (button/plate/door); each peer's floppy ragdoll is dynamic and synced via the standard transform pathway. Falls off the edge auto-respawn at the last checkpoint reached. First to the goal flag wins; everyone gets a finish time.
